properties.summary: The drug is a stimulant and empathogen. It is reported to have similar effects to MDMA but typically produces more visuals. The drug is reportedly more neurotoxic than MDMA, and is a minor metabolite of MDMA. The duration and onset are reported to be similar to MDMA. The common Marquis reagent test is unable to differentiate MDA and MDMA.

_general: Synthesis of fluoro analogues of 3,4-(methylenedioxy)amphetamine (MDA) and its derivatives - http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/17193269
